scenarios.name: Board Scout renders above the card grid with populated enemy and plant rosters and no load errors

Board Scout supports card selection and swaps the detail view between enemies and plants
Board Scout renders tutorial and challenge wave timelines with the expected new-threat badges
Board Scout collapses and expands the scout body from the toggle
Board Scout stays visible without horizontal overflow on a mobile viewport
Board Scout renders the April 14 scenario roster and wave structure from config data

Board Scout clicking an enemy card selects it and shows enemy detail stats
Board Scout clicking a plant card deselects the enemy card and shows plant detail stats

Board Scout exposes nav and heading semantics, and toggle collapse state is communicated
Board Scout supports keyboard traversal through scout cards in DOM order and Enter selection
Board Scout keeps inventory aria-pressed states and card-name contrast at AA
Board Scout responsive mobile: scout is visible with no horizontal overflow
Board Scout responsive mobile: every roster card fits within the viewport width
Board Scout responsive mobile: opening the detail panel does not cause horizontal overflow
Board Scout responsive mobile: collapse toggle meets minimum tap target size
Board Scout responsive tablet: no horizontal overflow on scout or body
Board Scout responsive tablet: no horizontal overflow after opening the detail panel
Board Scout responsive tablet: scout rail and game-cards grid reflow at tablet width
Board Scout responsive desktop: scout rail renders full-width within container
Board Scout responsive desktop: roster cards display in a horizontal row layout
Board Scout responsive desktop: no horizontal overflow at desktop width

Deterministic scene transitions, placement, and enemy hooks
